_meta.title: AI Assistant — streaming plan block
_meta.description: Posted inside the Bolt Assistant side-panel in response to '@revflow suggest upsell for Acme'. The plan + task_card primitives (GA Feb 2026) stream updates as each step progresses, giving users transparent 'thinking steps'. Final answer is rendered with the markdown block (GA Feb 2025).

elements.text: Last 18 months: 6 orders · $412k total · 73% product concentration on ProBook + CloudSync
Pulled 47 SKUs from their price book; scored on affinity + margin + contract alignment
CloudSync annual term ends May 31. Support contract renewal window is open.
Drafted 3 upsell angles with expected revenue and confidence

blocks.text:
### Top 3 upsell angles for Acme

**1. Expand CloudSync seats (highest confidence)**
Acme bought 20 seats last June. Their headcount has grown ~25% based on LinkedIn signals. Offer 10 more seats at their negotiated $149/seat (12% disc) = **+$1,488 ARR**. Close probability: **~82%**.

**2. Upgrade ProBook Elite → ProBook Pro workstations (5 units)**
IT lead at Acme asked about 'workstation performance' in last Zoom (captured in gong call transcript). Pro model is +$800/unit. 5 units × $2,999 = **+$14,995 one-time**. Close probability: **~55%** (needs budget approval).

**3. Attach Extended Support 5-year (vs current 3-year)**
2-year uplift at $99/device × 20 devices = **+$1,980** ARR. Slam dunk — 94% of customers renewing CloudSync attach this. Close probability: **~90%**.

---

**Total upside if all three land:** ~$18,463. Recommended order: start with (3) — it's easiest, then pitch (1) at the renewal meeting, and keep (2) warm for Q3.
